facts: 66+ datasets across drug discovery; built-in scaffold / cold-start / temporal splits per task.
hypotheses: A single ADMET generalist method wins across all 22 endpoints.
The temporal split gives a more honest estimate of real-world generalization than the scaffold split.
intuitions: TDC leaderboard SOTA 2024-25; cross-TDC foundation-model results.
unknowns: TDC bundles heterogeneous tasks under 'drug discovery' — structural coherence presupposed, not justified.
'Cold-start' is defined differently per task, so inter-task consistency cannot be determined.
